mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS ( SELECT dept_cd FROM rotemDemo_zzz.zzz_dept_info WHERE dept_cd = #{deptCd} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT d.dept_cd FROM rotemDemo_zzz.zzz_dept_info d JOIN dept_tree t ON d.dept_parent_cd = t.dept_cd WHERE d.use_yn = 'Y' ) SELECT e.emp_id AS empId , e.emp_nm AS empNm , e.emp_alias AS empAlias , h.dept_cd AS deptCd , d.dept_nm AS deptNm , e.position_cd AS positionCd , c.com_cd_nm AS jobNm , e.work_yn AS workYn , e.use_yn AS useYn , CASE WHEN IFNULL(h.ed_dt, '') = '' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS currentDeptYn , h.sd_dt AS sdDt
, ifnull(nullif(e.retire_date, ''), nullif(h.ed_dt, '')) AS edDt FROM dept_tree dt JOIN rotemDemo_zzz.zzz_emp_dept_hist h ON h.dept_cd = dt.dept_cd
JOIN rotemDemo_zzz.zzz_emp_info e ON e.emp_id = h.emp_id AND e.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN rotemDemo_zzz.zzz_dept_info d ON d.dept_cd = h.dept_cd
LEFT JOIN rotemDemo_zzz.zzz_code_info c ON c.com_cd = e.position_cd AND c.supi_com_cd = 'ZZZ0004'
WHERE replace(h.sd_dt, '-', '') <= replace(#{endDate}, '-', '') AND (h.ed_dt IS NULL OR h.ed_dt = '' OR replace(h.ed_dt, '-', '') >= replace(#{startDate}, '-', ''))
AND e.work_yn = #{workYn}
ORDER BY e.work_yn desc, currentDeptYn desc, e.emp_id

select h.hist_id as histId, h.emp_id as empId, h.dept_cd as deptCd, h.sd_dt as sdDt, h.ed_dt as edDt from zzz_emp_dept_hist h where h.emp_id = #{empId} and replace(h.sd_dt, '-', '') <= replace(#{targetDate}, '-', '') and ( h.ed_dt is null or h.ed_dt = '' or replace(h.ed_dt, '-', '') >= replace(#{targetDate}, '-', '') ) order by replace(h.sd_dt, '-', '') desc, h.hist_id desc limit 1

select e.emp_id as empId , e.emp_nm as empNm , e.emp_alias as empAlias , e.dept_cd as deptCd , b.dept_nm as deptNm , e.join_date as joinDate , e.work_yn as workYn , e.use_yn as useYn , c.com_cd_nm as jobNm , e.retire_date , h.sd_dt , h.ed_dt from rotemDemo_zzz.zzz_emp_info e left join rotemDemo_zzz.zzz_emp_dept_hist h on e.emp_id = h.emp_id and h.dept_cd = #{deptCd} left join rotemDemo_zzz.zzz_dept_info b on e.dept_cd = b.dept_cd left join rotemDemo_zzz.zzz_code_info c on e.position_cd = c.com_cd AND c.supi_com_cd = 'ZZZ0004' where 1 = 1
and e.emp_id = #{empId}
and e.emp_nm like concat('%', #{empNm}, '%')
order by h.hist_id desc limit 1
